_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Tumor surface coverage analysis was performed using Student's t-test and was significantly larger than control animals that did not receive any injections
details: Significant tumor formation observed 11 days post-C6 injection with statistically significant larger tumor surface coverage compared to controls (P < 0.005)
